---
title: "Welcome to My Blog"
author: "Tran Dang Huy (Andy)"
date: 2025-09-01
categories: [Welcome]
description: "Welcome to my e-portfolio blog. Here I'll share projects, analyses, and reflections on data analytics."
---

Welcome to my blog! I'm Andy (Tran Dang Huy), a Master of Business Analytics student at Monash University.

In this space I'll be posting analyses, project write-ups, and reflections on topics in data analytics, machine learning, and economics. Stay tuned for more posts.
